description_long: This is a freestanding wooden chest of drawers with a gray woodgrain finish and a rectangular top surface. The front features three large drawers, each equipped with two round metal knobs, providing ample storage space. The sides display a continuous woodgrain pattern, while the back panel is plain and lighter in color, likely made of a different material for cost efficiency. The top surface is flat and slightly overhangs the body, making it suitable for placing decorative items or everyday objects. The overall construction appears sturdy, with a solid base and clean, modern lines. This piece would be commonly found in urban interiors such as apartments, offices, or lobbies, serving both functional and aesthetic purposes.
description: A gray woodgrain chest of drawers with three large drawers and round metal knobs, featuring a flat top and sturdy construction. The design is modern and practical, suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: Front view showing three drawers with six round metal knobs and a flat overhanging top.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying the continuous woodgrain texture and the depth of the cabinet.
description_view_2: Rear view revealing a plain, light-colored back panel with no visible hardware or features.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible woodgrain and the side profile of the knobs.
